home.title: Meals that Care
home.subtitle: 100 easy, healthy and delicious recipes to take care of yourself at every meal, in Spanish, English and French.
home.philosophyBody: Lunch can be hearty because you have the whole day ahead to be active and digest. Dinner should be light and easy to digest, so you can sleep soundly. Every recipe in this collection respects that principle.

recipesIndex.title: Recipes
recipesIndex.subtitle: Organized by category and time of day. Each one respects nutritional coherence between lunch and dinner.

recipe.costQualityNote: We reflect quality ingredients that care for you well, not the cheapest option on the market.
recipe.portionNote: Recalculates ingredients and total cost. Nutrition info is per serving and doesn't change.
recipe.onlyInSpanish: The professional translation of this recipe into this language is still in progress.
recipe.shareSoon: In the real app: generates a link to share
recipe.printSoon: In the real app: opens a print-ready view
recipe.addedToShoppingList: Ingredients added to your shopping list

auth.title: Sign in to your account
auth.subtitle: No password: we'll send a sign-in link to your email.
auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in code to {email}.
auth.useSameEmail: Use the same email you purchased with on Hotmart.
auth.linkExpired: That link isn't valid anymore — it may have expired or already been used. Request a new one below.
auth.noAccessTitle: We don't see an active purchase yet
auth.noAccessBody: You signed in successfully, but this email doesn't have an active purchase of Meals that Care. If you purchased with a different email, contact support; if you haven't purchased yet, you can do so from the recipes page.
auth.favoritesEmpty: You haven't saved any recipes yet. Explore the recipes and tap the heart to save them here.

landing.heroTitle: A recipe book that knows what time it is.
landing.heroSubtitle: This isn't another recipe PDF. It's a premium web app that separates what you eat at lunch from what you eat at dinner — and tells you exactly what it'll cost before you go shopping.
landing.offerReturnsNote: This price closes when the countdown ends. After that, it goes to $69 USD.
landing.ctaSignIn: I already bought it, sign in
landing.painTitle: People don't need another recipe list. They need to stop guessing.
landing.pain1Body: Most recipe books mix everything together. This one separates every recipe by time of day: lunches can be hearty, dinners are designed to be light and easy to digest.
landing.pain2Title: "How much is this going to cost me?"
landing.pain2Body: Every recipe shows an estimated total and per-serving cost, with an update date and a stated reliability level — never an invented figure.
landing.pain3Body: A portion recalculator and a shopping list that builds itself from any recipe.
landing.pain4Body: A warm, supportive tone, not a restrictive one. No "forbidden" foods, no guilt language, no medical promises.
landing.includesTitle: A complete product, not a file.
landing.feature1Body: Spanish, English and French — professionally translated, not machine-translated.
landing.feature2Body: 1, 2, 4, 6, 8 or custom, with real culinary rounding.
landing.feature3Body: Total and per serving, with source, date and reliability level.
landing.feature4Body: Estimates with a cited source, no medical claims.
landing.diffEyebrow: Why this one and not another
landing.diffTitle: The difference versus a typical recipe book.
landing.diffRow1Ours: Spanish, English and French from the ground up
landing.diffRow2Ours: Explicit coherence between lunch and dinner
landing.diffRow3Ours: Cost per recipe and per serving, with a source
landing.diffRow4Ours: Web app: recalculates, saves, translates, filters
landing.sampleTitle: A real recipe from the product, in full.
landing.faq1Q: Is this a PDF I'll download?
landing.faq1A: No. It's a web app with your own account — it updates, saves your favorites, and recalculates portions live.
landing.faq2Q: What happens if new recipes are added after I buy?
landing.faq2A: You get them at no extra cost — that's the standard for digital products on Hotmart.
landing.faq3A: They're reference estimates for Bogotá, Colombia, always marked with their update date — not live prices pulled from a specific store.
landing.faq4Q: Does this work if I have a medical condition or allergy?
landing.faq4A: Every recipe lists allergens and offers alternatives. The product doesn't replace guidance from a health professional.
landing.closingTitle: 100 recipes. Three languages. One simple principle.
landing.closingBody: Sign in with the same email you used for your Hotmart purchase.
landing.signedInNoAccessTitle: You're signed in, but we don't see an active purchase
landing.signedInNoAccessBody: You're connected as {email}. If you purchased with a different email, sign out and sign back in with that one. If you purchased with this same email and it still isn't showing up, contact support.

shoppingList.title: Shopping list
shoppingList.subtitle: Combines automatically when you add the same ingredient from several recipes.
shoppingList.emptyBody: Add ingredients from any recipe with the "Add to shopping list" button, or type something below.

footer.note: Comidas que te Cuidan — Meals that Care — Des Repas qui Prennent Soin.
